item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
config='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json'
doc='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/docs/policy.md'
python3 -c 'import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path(\"longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json\"); d=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert list(d)==[\"version\",\"mode\",\"retry_limit\",\"reviewers\"]; assert type(d[\"version\"]) is int and d[\"version\"]==2; assert type(d[\"mode\"]) is str and d[\"mode\"]==\"audit\"; assert type(d[\"retry_limit\"]) is int and d[\"retry_limit\"]==3; assert d[\"reviewers\"]==[\"ada\",\"lin\"]; print(\"json_exact=PASS\")'
if grep -Hin 'strict' \""'$config" "$doc"; then exit 1; fi
printf '"'abandoned_term_absent=PASS\\n'
grep -Fq 'Audit mode records policy-check results for reviewer inspection.' \""'$doc"
grep -Fq '"'retried up to three times' \""'$doc"
[ "$(tail -n 1 "$doc")" = '"'Internal rehearsal only.' ]
if grep -Hin 'production' \""'$config" "$doc"; then exit 1; fi
if grep -HEn '"'[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}|[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}' \""'$config" "$doc"; then exit 1; fi
for file in "$config" "$doc"; do iconv -f UTF-8 -t UTF-8 "$file" >/dev/null; done
printf '"'doc_mode_retry_final_line=PASS\\nforbidden_word_timestamps_utf8=PASS\\n'"

/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
config='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json'
doc='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/docs/policy.md'
python3 -c 'import json, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path(\"longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json\"); d=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert list(d)==[\"version\",\"mode\",\"retry_limit\",\"reviewers\"]; assert type(d[\"version\"]) is int and d[\"version\"]==2; assert type(d[\"mode\"]) is str and d[\"mode\"]==\"audit\"; assert type(d[\"retry_limit\"]) is int and d[\"retry_limit\"]==3; assert d[\"reviewers\"]==[\"ada\",\"lin\"]; print(\"json_exact=PASS\")'
if grep -Hin 'strict' \""'$config" "$doc"; then exit 1; fi
printf '"'abandoned_term_absent=PASS\\n'
grep -Fq 'Audit mode records policy-check results for reviewer inspection.' \""'$doc"
grep -Fq '"'retried up to three times' \""'$doc"
[ "$(tail -n 1 "$doc")" = '"'Internal rehearsal only.' ]
if grep -Hin 'production' \""'$config" "$doc"; then exit 1; fi
if grep -HEn '"'[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}|[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}' \""'$config" "$doc"; then exit 1; fi
for file in "$config" "$doc"; do iconv -f UTF-8 -t UTF-8 "$file" >/dev/null; done
printf '"'doc_mode_retry_final_line=PASS\\nforbidden_word_timestamps_utf8=PASS\\n'"
